final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing 9-grid cover image for a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) personal media account.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu aesthetic, authentic amateur creator vibe, playful and approachable, flat illustration with subtle texture
Composition: 3x3 grid layout, centered title block spanning the middle row, product placement in focal grid cells, portrait orientation optimized for mobile feed
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera as hero product, casual lifestyle context suggesting first-time user experience, relatable everyday setting
Scene/backdrop: soft neutral background with gentle gradient or subtle pattern, clean grid separators, cozy indoor or outdoor casual environment hints
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, warm and friendly, approachable and genuine amateur creator atmosphere
Color palette: soft pastels as base with one accent color for product highlight, warm tones to convey trust and authenticity
Text (verbatim): "大疆pocket4初体验"
Constraints: font must be cute and differentiated from standard sans-serif; grid must be clearly readable as 9-square layout; amateur aesthetic must feel authentic not polished
Avoid: overly professional studio lighting; generic corporate fonts; stock photo perfection; excessive filters; cluttered composition; Behance-style hyper-polished look
